---
title: "SMR summary"
author: "Darren Cameron"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
params:
  cell_types: null
  in_dir: null
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

# Set variables from params
cell_types <- params$cell_types
in_dir <- params$in_dir

# Function to read and format SMR table
read_smr_table <- function(cell_type, in_dir) {
  file_path <- file.path(in_dir, cell_type, paste0(cell_type, "_scz.smr"))
  if (file.exists(file_path)) {
    readr::read_tsv(file_path, col_types = cols(.default = "c", 
                                               Probe_bp = "i", 
                                               topSNP_bp = "i", 
                                               Freq = "d", 
                                               b_GWAS = "d", 
                                               se_GWAS = "d", 
                                               p_GWAS = "d", 
                                               b_eQTL = "d", 
                                               se_eQTL = "d", 
                                               p_eQTL = "d", 
                                               b_SMR = "d", 
                                               se_SMR = "d", 
                                               p_SMR = "d", 
                                               p_HEIDI = "d", 
                                               nsnp_HEIDI = "i")) %>%
      arrange(p_SMR) %>%
      mutate(across(c(Freq, b_GWAS, se_GWAS, p_GWAS, b_eQTL, se_eQTL, p_eQTL, b_SMR, se_SMR, p_SMR, p_HEIDI), 
                    ~ format(.x, digits = 3, scientific = TRUE)))
  } else {
    message("File not found for cell type: ", cell_type)
    return(NULL)
  }
}
```

### Tables

```{r plot_tables}
for (cell_type in cell_types) {
  cat("\n#### ", cell_type, "\n")
  smr_data <- read_smr_table(cell_type, in_dir)
  if (!is.null(smr_data)) {
    knitr::kable(smr_data)
  } else {
    cat("No data available for ", cell_type, ".\n")
  }
}

```

***
